signals.description: Creates panic and artificial time pressure to short-circuit careful thinking.
Caller claims to represent police, a government agency, a bank, or another trusted institution.

en: I am calling from the CBI
this is your bank's fraud department
hi: मैं सीबीआई से बोल रहा हूं
यह आपके बैंक का फ्रॉड विभाग है

signals.description: Instructs the victim to keep the call confidential and not consult family or colleagues.

en: stay on the line and don't hang up

signals.description: Escalates fear with claims of arrest, legal action, or account freezing.

hi: आपके नाम वारंट जारी हुआ है

signals.description: Directly requests money transfer, OTP, UPI PIN, or banking credentials.
Detected characteristics of AI-synthesized or voice-cloned speech. Scammers increasingly clone voices of family members or officials to gain trust.

escalation_rules.description: Authority impersonation followed by a payment/OTP ask within 60 seconds is a near-certain scam pattern.
Isolating the victim while threatening them is a classic digital-arrest pattern.
Full playbook observed: urgency, authority, secrecy, threat, payment.
AI-cloned voice combined with a payment request is a high-confidence fraud attempt — immediate block required.
Standalone AI voice clone detection warrants immediate elevated risk regardless of other signals.
